svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="DB50kKpHE1oSF9yXxvhr"> <mxGraphModel dx="1099" dy="1858" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="src" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="GitHub
Source code push" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipeline" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="AWS CodePipeline
Orchestrates pipeline stages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="build" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="AWS CodeBuild
Build & test Docker image" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Amazon ECR
Stores container image" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#D79B00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Amazon ECS
Deploys new task revision" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Application Load Balancer
Routes live traffic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="340" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="secrets" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;arcSize=12;" value="AWS Secrets Manager
Injects env secrets at build" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="620" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;arcSize=12;" value="Amazon CloudWatch
Deployment & failure alerts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="620" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="src" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="pipeline"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pipeline" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="build"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="build" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ecr"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="ecs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="alb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="secrets" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="build"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="cw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="ecs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="Architecture #07 — CI/CD Pipeline (CodePipeline → CodeBuild → ECR → ECS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="240" y="-20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
